creator: dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
text:
gd is a lib whiuch supports drawing functions
	for output in GIF-files.

Fix: 

keep gd-1.3 for all programms
	let gd-1.6 use diffrent names,
	treat them as a very diffrent lib eg. (libgd16.a).
	porgrams may use the one they need.
How-To-Repeat: 
	install gd-1-6.2
	and try to build any ports using gd

	gd-1.6 has a complete new interface,
	the fuctions for Gif-Files are no longer there.
